title: K-Shaped Economy Persists Due to Inflation
summary: New research identifies inflation as a key driver of the ongoing K-shaped economic recovery in the US, exacerbating inequality.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the uneven economic recovery and the disproportionate impact of inflation on different segments of the population.

title: Circle's Stablecoin Freeze Policy
summary: Circle will only freeze its stablecoin in response to a court order or law enforcement directive, raising questions about security.
charlotte_impact: Clarifies Circle's stance on stablecoin freezes, impacting user security and regulatory compliance discussions.

title: Gary Shilling Predicts Deep Stock Market Plunge
summary: Economist Gary Shilling forecasts a potential 30% drop in the S&P 500 by year-end due to high valuations and economic downturn.
charlotte_impact: A prominent economist's warning of a significant market correction could trigger investor caution and market volatility.

title: China Bans AI-Driven Layoffs
summary: Chinese court rules it illegal for employers to lay off workers to replace them with AI, protecting employee rights.
charlotte_impact: Sets a precedent for AI-related labor laws, potentially influencing similar regulations in other countries.

title: The Rise of China's AI Agent Economy
summary: Explores the growth of China's AI agent economy, including install queues, side hustles, and stock bets.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates the innovative applications and economic impact of AI technology in China.

title: American Economic Sentiment Plummets
summary: Americans express increasing dissatisfaction with the economy, fueled by factors like rising gas prices.

title: Wall Street Bullishness Contrasts Consumer Gloom

title: Poll: Americans Distrust Trump on Crypto

title: Meta's AI Push Leads to Layoffs, Wage Suppression
